prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年综合类最低录取位次分别为4554名、4018名、4464名、4256名、5051名，整体呈波动上升趋势。2025年位次较2024年后移约795名，为近五年最大降 幅，显示报考热度有所降温，2025年基准位次为5051名；该校在海南省综合类招生计划逐年递增：2021年13人、2022年14人、2023年15人、2024年17人、2025年 22人；2026年计划增至26人，较2025年扩招约18.2%，扩招幅度较大，有利于降低录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国矿业大学（北京）是教育部直属的211工程、双一流建设高校， 软科中国大学排名稳定在第76名左右，属于全国中上游水平，在矿业工程、安全科学与工程等领域具有显著的行业影响力；2022年该校曾出现师德师风相关负面 舆情，但2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，抖音热度未进入全国前106名，整体关注度一般，无明显正面或负面信号影响报考热度；第五。该校以矿业工程、安全科学与工程为传统优势领域。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工 程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，土木建筑、生化环材等传统专业明显劝退。该校招生专业涵盖电气工程、计算机、人工智能等热门方向，也有安全工程、土木工程等传统专业， 整体专业结构对考生有一定吸引力。海南省考生总数从2021年52977人持续增长至2025年67408人，2026年预计达78000人，增幅约15.7%，竞争加剧。；学校位于北京市，属于一线城市，对海南考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在海南省的招生计划逐年增加，2026年计划26人，占比较小但持续增长。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的趋势、2026年招生计划扩招约18.2%的利好、以及海南省考生总数预计增长约15.7%带来的竞争加剧，扩招与考生增长相互抵消后，预计2026年最 低录取位次较2025年略有前移。预测最低位次约5572名，区间5072-6072名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects were 4554, 4018, 4464, 4256, and 5051 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend. In 2025, the ranking shifted back by about 795 places compared to 2024, the largest drop in five years, indicating a cooling in application popularity. The baseline ranking for 2025 is 5051. The university's enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Hainan Province has been increasing year by year: 13 in 2021, 14 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 17 in 2024, and 22 in 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 26, an expansion of about 18.2% compared to 2025, which is a significant increase and helps lower the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Mining and Technology (Beijing) is a directly affiliated university under the Ministry of Education, a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks steadily around 76th in the Soft Science China University Rankings, placing it in the upper-middle tier nationally. It has significant industry influence in fields such as mining engineering and safety science and engineering. In 2022, the university experienced negative public opinion related to teacher ethics, but in 2026, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed. Its Douyin popularity did not enter the national top 106, indicating generally low attention, with no obvious positive or negative signals affecting application popularity. Fifth. The university's traditional strengths lie in mining engineering and safety science and engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering remains high, while traditional majors like civil engineering, biology, chemistry, environment, and materials are clearly discouraged. The university's enrollment majors include popular directions such as electrical engineering, computer science, and artificial intelligence, as well as traditional majors like safety engineering and civil engineering. The overall major structure has a certain appeal to candidates. The total number of candidates in Hainan Province has been continuously increasing from 52,977 in 2021 to 67,408 in 2025, and is expected to reach 78,000 in 2026, an increase of about 15.7%, intensifying competition. The university is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has strong regional appeal to Hainan candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Hainan Province has been increasing year by year, with 26 planned for 2026, a small proportion but continuously growing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the favorable enrollment expansion of about 18.2% in 2026, and the expected increase of about 15.7% in the total number of candidates in Hainan Province intensifying competition, the expansion and candidate growth offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5572, with a range of 5072 to 6072.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5072-6072, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 majors as targets for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (below 5072), you can focus on applying to popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Computer Science and Technology. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 6072), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
